reply: Hi there, thanks so much for reaching out about the AeroSoft campaign, it sounds like a great fit for my audience! Quick question before I commit: how long does the brand get usage rights on the content I create?
Appreciate the invite. One thing I need to clear up upfront: would signing this lock me out of working with other footwear or athletic brands during the campaign?
This looks like a solid opportunity and I'm keen. Practically speaking, when would I actually receive the fixed fee after the content is up?
Love the shoes, genuinely. Before we go further, how long is a sale attributed to my affiliate link after someone clicks it?
Thanks for the details! Just to confirm the commercials, what's the exact commission percentage I earn on sales I drive?
Hey, excited about this one. Can you spell out exactly what deliverables you need from me so I can plan my shoot?
Sounds great and I'd love to be involved. What's the hard deadline for the content to be live?
This is right up my alley! Aside from the fee, what's the free product or reward that comes with the collab?
Quick one before I say yes, I'm sold on the concept. Do I get to keep the shoes after filming, or are they a loaner?
Really into this brand's aesthetic. Would AeroSoft be reposting my Reel and Stories on your own accounts, or does it stay on my page only?
Thanks, the offer's clear except one detail: is the 10% commission paid on top of the fixed fee, or does it replace it?
Hi! I'm interested and think $350 for a Reel plus Stories is fair. Just so I understand the earnings, for how long does my affiliate link keep tracking sales?
Hey, love the direction here. On usage rights, do you also need me to hand over the raw unedited files, or just the published posts?
Excited to potentially work together! Can you confirm the split, how many Reels versus how many Stories are you expecting?
This sounds fun. Just checking the scope, exactly how many Instagram Stories do you want in total?
Happy to move forward. After the 30-day usage rights lapse, is that renewable if you want to keep running the content?
Newer to brand deals so bear with me, everything looks good though. Your email mentions net-30, does that just mean I'm paid within 30 days of the content going live?
Solid brief, thank you. Is there any exclusivity lock-in that stops me posting for competitors while this runs?
Cute set of shoes! Small thing, does the branded sock set come included with the reward, or is that just the shoes?
I'm in, this feels very on-brand for me. For the Cloudstride pair, do I get to pick my own color and size?
Thanks for thinking of me! On the affiliate side, what's the cookie window, i.e. how many days after a click do I still earn on a purchase?
Great campaign concept. I just want to nail down cash flow on my end, how soon after publishing does the fee actually hit my account?
Loving this. When you say usage rights, which of your channels would actually reshare the content?
Okay this is exciting. Can you just confirm I read it right, the sales commission is ten percent?
Would genuinely love to do this. Remind me of the exact date the posts need to be published by?
Hey, thanks! I already have a small deal with another shoe label, would your exclusivity terms create a conflict there?
Super keen. Which exact AeroSoft model am I getting as the product reward?
Fair terms overall. For the affiliate link, how many days is the attribution window so I know how sales get credited to me?
Great, thanks for laying it out. Beyond the posts, does the 30-day usage grant let you run my content as paid ads?
All looks reasonable. Does the net-30 clock start when the content goes live, or when you approve it?
This is a yes from me in principle. Total package is one Reel and three Stories, correct?
Appreciate the clarity so far. The 10% on sales, that's additional income alongside the flat fee and not carved out of it, yes?
Fun collab! Does the branded sock set ship together with the shoes as part of the reward?
Happy to proceed at a fair number like $400. Just checking, once the 30-day usage window ends, do the rights simply expire?
Great fit for my feed. Confirming the timeline, everything needs to be posted by October 10th, right?
Thanks for the thorough brief. Is there any exclusivity requirement at all attached to this deal?
Love it. Just confirming the perk, the Cloudstride pair is mine to keep permanently, not a return-after-shoot thing?
Very interested! How many days is the affiliate attribution window so I can gauge the commission upside?
Terms read well. Can you define your payment timeline, when exactly does net-30 pay out?
Great brand, I'm keen. Are you planning to feature my Reel on AeroSoft's own Instagram, and is that covered by the usage rights?
Quick sanity check before I sign, the performance commission is set at 10 percent of sales, correct?
Excited! Break down the content package for me, what's the exact mix of Reel and Stories you need?
Looks good on my end. Does the 30-day usage right let AeroSoft reshare and repurpose the posts on your channels?
This works for me. Just so it's clear, I receive the Cloudstride shoes and sock set on top of the cash fee, right?
Nice offer. For the tracking link, how long does a click stay valid before a purchase stops counting toward me?
Thanks, this is tempting. Am I free to keep posting other partnerships since there's no category lock, or did I misread?
Sounds like a plan. After I invoice you post-launch, what's your standard payout timeline?
I'm genuinely excited about AeroSoft. Just lock in the date for me, content live by October 10, correct?
Great, quick logistics question, is it three Stories you want, or more?
Awesome campaign. Confirming, you only need a single Reel from me alongside the Stories?
Interested for sure. The 10% commission, is that calculated on the sale value driven through my link?
Terms are clear, thanks. When does the 30-day usage window begin, from posting or from approval?
Love the product line. To confirm the perk, I get both the running shoes and the branded socks?
Keen to do this. Simple question, when do I get paid the fee?
Thanks! Is your attribution window the standard 30 days on the affiliate link?
Really like the fit here. Does this deal stop me collaborating with other athletic brands during the term?
Great, let's talk scope, what's the complete deliverable list I'm signing up for?
Happy with a rate around $350. On rights, are you only resharing the content, or claiming it fully?
Can't wait! For the Cloudstride reward, are all sizes available for me to choose from?
Quick one before we finalize, what percent do I take on each sale?
I'm on board. By what date do the Reel and Stories have to be published?
Terms look fair. To plan invoicing, does net-30 begin counting the day the content goes live?
Love this. So the free product is a pair of AeroSoft Cloudstride shoes, do I have that right?
Interested! How many days does my referral link stay active for commissions after someone clicks?
Thanks for the brief. Just confirming there's genuinely no exclusivity clause I need to worry about?
Excited to collaborate. Confirming the ask is one Instagram Reel plus three Stories, correct?
Great deal. If the campaign performs, can the 30-day usage rights be extended later?
All good here. What are the payment terms, net-30 from launch, or something else?
Nearly ready to sign. Is the 10% commission layered on top of the fixed fee, giving me both revenue streams?
Love the extras. The branded sock set is part of the reward alongside the shoes, correct?
